displayTitle: The Complete Marvel Years Omnibus, Vol. 3
synopsis: Collects Star Wars (1977) #79-80, Return Of The Jedi #1-4, Star Wars (1977) #81-107 & Annual 3 and material from Pizzazz #1-16, Star Wars Weekly (UK) #60, 94-99, 104-115, Empire Strikes Back Monthly (UK) #149, 151, 153-157, and Star Wars (UK) #159.
title: Star Wars: The Complete Marvel Years Omnibus, Vol. 3
